causalAutopsy.notes: The burn runbook treated asynchronous Telegram delivery as fire-and-forget. A permanently deleted configured topic was indistinguishable from a transient failure, so later detector intervals retried it forever and no durable user-visible terminal notice existed.

guardEvidence.howCaught: Terminal topic quarantine bounds primary delivery to one attempt per dead topic under sustained hourly detector pressure; the N and 2N horizons both settle at one.
